creator: _jkrow
caption:
Social media vs. reality from the infamous Drake Passage 💀 

This is the stretch of ocean between South America and Antarctica where two ocean currents collide and create some of the roughest waters on Earth. 

And - like 99.9% of people who go to Antarctica - we FULLY prepared for 3 straight days of the 30 foot rollers that we’ve seen all over Instagram. 

But alas, we were blessed with the very anticlimactic and much-lesser-talked-about Drake Lake. Nothing but (relatively) calm sailing go all the way across 🤣 and, according to the staff aboard the @lindbladexp Explorer, these conditions are WAY more common than social media will have you believe 

Would you cross the Drake Passage to get to Antarctica? 🚢

transcription.text: AHHHHHH!!! All the time, I'm grateful all the time I'm sexy and I'm kind, I'm pretty when I cry
